name: Kylius Lonavo
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing a full leveled set of light armor (excluding helmet and shield), always the best quality for the level. Wields a leveled enchanted claymore, also always best available quality. Carries his ring and a large amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: hostile, criminal, dangerous, ruthless
Role: Kylius Lonavo is a rogue and the boss of a skooma trafficking ring based out of Greyland, a small settlement located west of Leyawiin. The Legion wants him brought to justice for his skooma dealing operations.
Home Location Information: The house at Greyland settlement.
Daily Routine: Lonavo spends his time aimlessly wandering around inside the house at Greyland, never eating, sleeping, or unequipping his gear. He occasionally chats with the generic respawning Marauder who also inhabits the house.
Criminal Enterprise: Lonavo leads a small group of skooma dealers who have been operating out of Greyland. He has evaded capture for months, with Lerexus Callidus trying unsuccessfully to bring him down.
Combat Abilities: In combat, Lonavo uses a major leveled Illusion spell (Chameleon, Invisibility, or Silence) alongside his enchanted claymore, making him a formidable opponent.
Reputation: Lerexus Callidus warns that Lonavo is a snake who wouldn't think twice about burying his blade in someone's back. His ruthlessness and skill have kept him ahead of the Legion's efforts to stop his skooma trade.
Personality - The Skooma Kingpin: Lonavo is hostile and dangerous, attacking on sight when detected. He's ruthless in his criminal operations and has proven elusive to Legion authorities. His willingness to fight rather than flee, combined with his combat prowess and magical abilities, make him a serious threat. He maintains his operation through violence and intimidation.
author: Bethesda
